title: License Compliance Engine — Dual-License Detection & NOTICE File Generation
description: license_compliance.py has 50+ OSS licenses with a compatibility matrix, policy engine (ALLOW/WARN/BLOCK/REQUIRE-APPROVAL), SBOM audit, obligation tracking, and dual-license detection. test_license_compliance.py and license_compliance_router.py confirm full stack. Gap: NOTICE/ATTRIBUTION file generation is listed as a feature in the docstring but not implemented — obligation tracking only stores obligations without rendering the NOTICE file.
missing: NOTICE file generator: implement generate_notice_file(project_id) that collects all obligations and renders a compliant NOTICE file in Apache format
ATTRIBUTION file export: /api/v1/license-compliance/attribution/{project_id} endpoint that returns a downloadable ATTRIBUTION.txt for distribution
License compatibility matrix API: /api/v1/license-compliance/compatibility that checks if two licenses are compatible for linking/distribution
